title: GERIATRIC DENTAL GROUP - 211info
text: GERIATRIC DENTAL GROUP VANCOUVER GERIATRIC DENTAL GROUP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides general dental care such as diagnostic, preventive, restorative, oral surgery, endodontic, fixed, and removable prosthetics. Also can deliver dental treatment to non-ambulatory patients in care facilities and private homes. 16500 SE 15th Street Suite 150 Vancouver, WA 98683 Eligibility: Age 55 and older or any age who are homebound or in need of a wheelchair-accessible clinic Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Email (360) 326-3829 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (360) 326-3829 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service, interest-free payment plans are available DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, insurance card, list of current medications if applicable AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at the corner of 164th Avenue and SE 15th Street in the Columbia Tech Center area. Services: Cosmetic Dentistry * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Cosmetic Dentistry * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Cosmetic Dentistry * Homebound Cosmetic Dentistry * Older Adults Dental Hygiene * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Dental Hygiene * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Dental Hygiene * Homebound Dental Hygiene * Older Adults Dental Prosthodontics * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Dental Prosthodontics * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Dental Prosthodontics * Homebound Dental Prosthodontics * Older Adults Dental Restoration * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Dental Restoration * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Dental Restoration * Homebound Dental Restoration * Older Adults Endodontics * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Endodontics * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Endodontics * Homebound Endodontics * Older Adults Geriatric Dentistry Mobile Dental Care * Homebound Oral/Maxillofacial Surgery * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Oral/Maxillofacial Surgery * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Oral/Maxillofacial Surgery * Homebound Oral/Maxillofacial Surgery * Older Adults Periodontics * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Periodontics * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Periodontics * Homebound Periodontics * Older Adults If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
